title: Bare Bones Short Swords (Overlay)
description: Shortens the swords of the Bare Bones texture pack!
body:
![Wooden, Stone, Gold, Iron, and Diamond swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c18546996099a4edd0c95ce90a334e1833074fe.png)

This resource pack is an overlay for the Bare Bones texture pack, specifically 1.8.9, shortening  the swords.
